message:
fix: suppress default SIGINT handler so Ctrl+C doesn't kill process

Node's default SIGINT handler exits the process before ink's useInput
can handle the \x03 keystroke. Register a no-op SIGINT handler during
the TUI session so InputArea's two-stage Ctrl+C logic works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
